hotel_name: Sunbay Homestay Cù Lao Chàm (Sunbay Homestay Cu Lao Cham)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Please dont go here they scam people on app and paid money already when we visit on property the owners rejected they say we dont see any booking here in this property and we need to again extra money to them

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.positives: The location directly at the pier was nice. From our room we had a beautiful view of the harbor.
reviews.negatives: The staff did not seem to have any interest in us at all. While eating they didn't look at you while ordering and after bringing the food never came back to ask if everything is okay or if we'd like something extra to drink. The rooms were not clean and looked like they hadn't been cleaned before arriving.

reviews.title: I hope you pay attention to the accommodations.
reviews.text:
A place that focuses on the restaurant business rather than the accommodation industry. 
The price for one night is about 300,000 VND, which is good value on Cham Island, but aside from the towels, nothing is clean at all. 
The shower hose in the bathroom leaks water continuously, which is annoying throughout the night, and it seems they have no intention of fixing it. It must waste more than 100 liters a day due to the leak; don't they care about the money? The motorcycle rental is also the most expensive in the area at 180,000 VND, boasting that it has fuel included (I rented from another hotel for 150,000 VND). What is taken for granted by Koreans is seen as consideration in Vietnam. 
Of course, the pricing is based on a day, not on a 24-hour basis, so whether it's for 1 hour or 12 hours, the price remains the same. 
Every time I pass by, they keep asking if I haven't eaten, and the soundproofing is non-existent, so I have to endure noise all day long. Cham Island is generally peaceful and nice, but the locals' hospitality is quite lacking. I understand that the prices are high due to transportation costs, but being 2-3 times more expensive than on the mainland makes staying long-term burdensome. 
If I return to Cham Island, I would probably stay one night at the Coral Hotel.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Lovely location right on the harbor front- beautiful view from bedroom. Owners were friendly and recommended good places to see on the island- cheap motor bike and snorkel rental .
reviews.negatives: On the first night we had a slight issue with multiple cockroaches appearing on the bed and floor which was a little dirty. We did bring it up to the host who cleaned the room and gave us bug spray so the issue was solved. Also when booking the ticket back it seemed  reluctant to let us get an early boat however when we asked another homestay they proved to be far more accommodating and sorted it out right away.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Ai over view is awful.clean rooms and easy to get around island

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The couple that run Sunbay are great.  She will cook anything off their menu, plus special requests.  He speaks english and was very helpful.
reviews.negatives:
There were no bicycles to rent, but it is a hilly island.  
There are no desks in the room but the owner brought up a table from the restaurant.

reviews.title: The island has seen better days
reviews.text: Wonderful island to relax and recharge.  The menu was varied and a good value.  Quiet and peaceful.  I found only one restaurant with A/C on the island

reviews.title: Looking for a great value and great location with outstanding staff then choose this place asap!
reviews.positives: The staff were very helpful to me as a  senior. The location was ideal close  to the port. Easy walk to small cafes. The hotel restaurant was a good value with a varied menu and good service
reviews.negatives: I did not realize only moto bikes or walking to the beaches!

reviews.title: Sunbay is a lovely little hotel.
reviews.text: I stayed for 6 days. At about ***  per night to stay in paradise. During the week you can almost have a beach to yourself. The small fishing village is charming.  I could stay there all summer.

reviews.title: Cham island
reviews.positives: The location as well as the friendly staff who organized us an adventure while we waited for check in as well as scooter rental for our group which made the island that much more enjoyable

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The owner and the staff are very friendly and enthusiastic, the food at home is also very fresh and delicious as they go grocery shopping every day, and the prices for the accommodation, food, and drinks are very reasonable.

reviews.title: I ended up staying a total of 3 days , mainly because I had trouble going to and from the island because of weather , bu
reviews.positives: Very nice and clean place , also very comfortable rooms and good location , also very good staff and very helpful
reviews.negatives: Nothing , had a good time here

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The lovely home owner is very supportive and dedicated, the food she cooks is great, the view is beautiful, and she takes care of everything like a parent during the trip❤️❤️❤️

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Friendly reception✌️
 Rapid motorbike rent delivery👍🏻
Amazing and unique island🧡

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Amazing friendly staff, truly the homestay experience.

reviews.title: Lovely stay
reviews.text: Fabulous home stay , room basic but very cheap and for sleeping . Sea food bbq platter was absolutely amazing. Very lovely family , polite and helpful, would definitely stay again , nothing was too much . Just along from the very so easy drop off with backpacks then lots of mopeds thereto explore island

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Our host speaks perfect English and cooks beautiful meals.

reviews.title: Séjour Ile de Cham
reviews.text:
Le propriétaire est très accueillant et parle anglais ce qui est bien pratique. Chambre 103 et 106 à conseiller, car fenêtre vers le port avec petit balcon devant et on peut aérer!!! . ( Les autres chambres n'ont pas de vue et plutôt un mur en face !), pas toujours de l'eau chaude, salle de bain précaire !
On nous a fourni un petit plan de l'île et location de moto. 2 plages nous ont laissé un souvenir très agréable, la baie à 300 m  ( dos tourné à la mer, il faut monter une côte un peu raide à droite au bout du village du port), la seule accessible à pied, sable blanc, eau turquoise, mais toujours un peu trouble. Et la 3 ème crique, plus grande en continuant sur cette même route, aller en moto plus loin (pour descendre en moto à bla plage) que les premiers escaliers qui y descendent, une gentille Vietnamienne y fait la cuisine -excellentes nems !!!, noix de coco fraîches, salade, poisson 🐟....avec transats et parasols... parfait pour une pause les pieds dans le sable.
Ça faut le coup de passer une nuit sur l'île, car les bateaux partent à partir de 7h30, 8h30  du port de Hoi An ( port Cua Dai) et reviennent tous vers 13h ou 13h30 du port de Lao Cham vers Hoi An. A/R 500 dongs- 17€

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Se encuentra muy céntrico y enfrente del mar.
reviews.negatives: Reservamos la habitación doble económica y la ventana da a un muro que se encuentra a una distancia de aproximadamente 40 cm que no se ve en las fotos aparecen en la página web. La puerta del baño no tiene pestillo, las colchas estaban sucias y hay mucha humedad en la habitación con moho en las paredes.

reviews.title: Nie wieder!
reviews.text:
Das Zimmer und insbesondere das Bad waren total verdreckt. Ich denke es wurde nur der Bettbezug gewechselt und das wars.

Jeden Abend läuft direkt vor der Unterkunft laute Musik. Dann findet eine 3 stündige Karaoke Veranstaltung direkt neben der Unterkunft ab. Was schön wäre, wenn es nicht in einer Lautstärke wäre dass die Wände zittern.

Erst hat mir der Host zu gesichert das ich ein Tag früher gehen darf und mein Geld zurück bekomme. Das ist leider nicht geschehen. Er hat das Geld einbehalten.

Auch wollte er mir nicht helfen ein Speedboat zu organisieren. Da ich das Ticket "nicht bei ihm" gekauft habe, sondern bereits am Hafen gezahlt hatte. So stand ich da mit einem Open Return Ticket ohne Hilfe. Zum Glück hat mir mein vorheriger wundervoller Host von der Insel geholfen.

Das war der schlechteste Honestay den ich in ganz Vietnam hatte. Schade, weil alle anderen waren wundervoll!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Estaba cerca del puerto donde están la mayoría de restaurantes de las Islas.
reviews.negatives: Sabemos que los alojamientos que hay en la isla son bastante básicos pero eso no quiere decir que no tenga que estar limpios para los huéspedes. El tres días no vaciaron la papelera del baño ( teniendo en cuenta que no se puede tirar el papel al baño) , ni hicieron absolutamente nada de la habitación.

reviews.title: Lage toll, Sauberkeit nicht vorhanden
reviews.text: Die Unterkunft sieht auf Bildern vernünftig aus, liegt auch schön am Hafen. Aber leider lässt die Sauberkeit, allen voran im Bad deutlich zu wünschen übrig. Schimmel, ein Spiegel ohne Spiegelbild, Haare im Abfluss... Das erste Mal in 4 Wochen haben wir in Asien nicht geduscht deshalb.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: La comida del restaurante barata y de buena calidad .
reviews.negatives: En la habitación había humedad

reviews.title: Für 1-2 Nächte gerne , länger nicht
reviews.text: Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und die Lage sehr zentral. Frühstück und Essen hat uns gut geschmeckt und die Preise sind wie sonst im Ort identisch. Unser Zimmer hatte leider keinen Abzug sodass die Wäsche nie trocknet und dadurch das ganze Zimmer muffig riecht. Von Beginn bis Ende . Daher für 1-2 Nächte ok länger würden wir nächstes Mal nicht bleiben

reviews.title: Buena localización
reviews.positives: La ubicación es buena, muy cerca del puerto y al lado de una playa chulisima que nos recomendaron en el hotel
reviews.negatives: Intentan venderte todo, muy insistentes en que hagas allí tus comidas y excursiones. La cama un poco dura

reviews.title: Not the room in the photo, mold in the room
reviews.text:
We checked into the hotel at around 4:00 PM. We booked one of the most expensive Deluxe rooms — in the photo it looked spacious, with two windows, a bedside lamp, nightstands and a flower. In fact, we were put in a different room: only one window, no nightstand, no lamp, no promised robes.

I checked with the owner — he said that other guests were already staying in the room and he could move us tomorrow. We were only there for 2 days, so we decided not to move. Perhaps we should have, because later we noticed a serious problem — large black mold spots in the room that were showing through the paint. This is not a cosmetic defect, but a potentially dangerous thing for your health. I am attaching a photo so that it is clear what I am talking about.

reviews.title: Cómodos y anfitriones maravillosos
reviews.positives: El alojamiento está muy bien para el precio que tiene. Las habitaciones no son muy grandes, pero cumplen su función. Además tienen una terraza compartida muy agradable y aire acondicionado. Los dueños son maravillosos. Personas cercanas que te intentan ayudar a hacer actividades, sin aprovecharse de los turistas (evidentemente sacan su beneficio también, pero no te timan). A nosotros concretamente, el dueño del hotel nos buscó por todas las playas de la isla con su moto porque habían cambiado la hora de nuestro ferry (ajeno completamente a él) para que llegáramos a tiempo.
reviews.negatives: No hay mucho comentario negativo. Algunos de los precios de las actividades son algo superiores a lo que esperábamos, pero nada desorbitado.

reviews.title: RECOMENDABLE 100%
reviews.positives: La ubicación es perfecta. El anfitrión es el mejor, te da todas las facilidades para disfrutar de la isla al maximo: motos baratas, excursiones, y puedes comer y cenar ahí. Y lo que no tenga en el momento se lo pide a su primo y te lo trae al momento. Sin duda, lo recomiendo 100%.

reviews.title: A ÉVITER
reviews.positives: Alors qu'on se trouve sur une petite île toute mignonne, on est réveillé le matin par des bruits de marteau piqueur. Et on se retrouve bloqués pendant 2 jours, car plus de bateaux, suite à une petite tempête. Très mauvais accueil et harcèlement incessant pour nous vendre ses plats dégueulasses.
reviews.negatives: Accueil, cuisine, électricité qui fonctionne uniquement si vous êtes dans la chambre. Du coup, quand vous rentrez le soir, la chambre est à 30°.

reviews.title: Manque d'honnêteté et pression commerciale permanente.
reviews.positives: La vue mer.
reviews.negatives:
Les propriétaires ont essayé de nous tromper 2 fois:
- En arrivant à l'hôtel en nous donnant une chambre qui n'était pas celle que nous avions réservé. Nous devions avoir une chambre avec salle de bain privative et nous avons eu une chambre avec salle de bain dans le couloir et séparée de la chambre voisine avec juste un rideau...
Nous avons finalement obtenu la bonne chambre après l'avoir réclamé. Ce ne peut pas être une erreur , ils ont juste essayé de nous donner une autre chambre moins confortable.
- En quittant l'hôtel le matin , la propriétaire nous a réclamé le paiement une seconde fois alors que nous avions déjà payé la veille ! Nous n' avions alors reçu aucune preuve de paiement. C'était clairement une tentative de vol. J'ai dû me mettre en colère pour éviter ce double paiement.

L'hôtel en soi est d'un mauvais rapport qualité prix : vielle salle de bain, chambre ayant aussi besoin de rénovation et structure pas très propre. 
Beaucoup de pression des propriétaires pour manger et faire des activités. Si vous refusez on ne vous sourit plus jusqu'à la fin du séjour.
Vous avez beaucoup mieux sur l'île pour ce prix.

reviews.title: À améliorer …
reviews.positives:
La pression de la douche.
L’emplacement.
reviews.negatives:
L’insistance des patrons pour que nous consommions dans leur restaurant. (Ce que nous avons fait le premier soir et clairement ce n’était pas terrible …)
Le fait que, ces mêmes patrons nous imposent 5% pour le paiement en carte (c’est 3%, n’écoutez pas leurs mensonges, et nous avons bien payé 3%).
De plus, nous avions la chambre familiale avec terrasse, à partager avec une autre chambre … le deuxième soir nous avons eu des touristes qui hurlaient …
Il y a aussi l’annonce a 5h du mat avec haut parleur …

Nous étions au Chams lockout et nous avons prolongé notre séjour de 3 jours, il n’avait malheureusement plus de place donc nous avons été au sunbay et grosse déception…

reviews.title: Escapade sur l ile de Cham
reviews.positives:
Personnel très gentil et serviable, toujours prêt à proposer des options. Les chambres sont simples mais fonctionnelles (climatisation, literie correcte). Nous avons apprécié les cocktails.

Points positifs : ils nous ont loué des scooters, et c’est vraiment indispensable sur l’île, surtout à leur emplacement. Mis à part les restaurants proches, pour aller à la plage il faut beaucoup marcher, avec des montées assez difficiles. Les scooters facilitent vraiment le séjour.
reviews.negatives:
Points à surveiller : beaucoup de services sont en supplément (ex. masque et tuba), l’extérieur est bruyant tôt le matin (cuisines, habitants qui se lèvent vers 5h30), et au restaurant certains produits annoncés n’étaient plus disponibles.
Nous avions souhaité pour le dernier soir ce faire plaisir avec du homard et des oursins....

Pour le snorkeling, on nous avait proposé une sortie que l’on pensait exclusive a 200 000 / tête (un petit bateau vers une crique spéciale), mais en réalité il s’agissait d’un gros bateau avec de nombreux touristes. 
C’était sympa malgré tout, mais décevant car les coraux sont quasiment tous morts et nous espérions une expérience plus authentique.

reviews.title: Emplacement central pour une nuit
reviews.positives:
Emplacement sur le port, juste devant le quai, très central. La chambre est simple et correcte, juste à côté du marché (un peu animé le matin). 
Les hôtes sont charmants, très serviables et souriants.

reviews.title: Bel accueil ! Nous le recommandons
reviews.positives: Le gîte est très bien placé au milieu du village près du débarcadère! L'hôte est accueillant et attentif. Le restaurant est sympa et la cuisine est bonne. Nous avons profité du lieu pour manger du poisson et des fruits de mer. Nous avons voulu faire un tour des îles en bateau privé et le propriétaire s’est occupé de tout . Merci

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: L'emplacement et la gentillesse des propriétaires
reviews.negatives: Salle de bains rudimentaire

reviews.title: Super Homestay, simple, confortable et bien placé,avec des hôtes très serviables
reviews.positives: L'emplacement,la chambre chaleureuse avec vue sur la mer,la gentillesse,la disponibilité et la grande serviabilité des hôtes
reviews.negatives: Les douches pas très chaudes

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Très bin séjour, personnel très agréable et sympathique. Vous vous y sentirez comme à la maison.
Nous avons passés un très bon séjour.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Petit hôtel très bien situé face au port 
Excellente nourriture 
Location de moto

reviews.title: Un de nos meilleurs moments au Vietnam . Le gérant très souriant et adorable, il fait tout pour vous aider et rendre vot
reviews.positives: La localisation, l’accueil exceptionnel, le cocktail maison

reviews.title: Hotel coup de coeur
reviews.positives: La propreté, l’emplacement et surtout l’accueil et la gentillesse des propriétaires

reviews.title: Séjour d’une nuit en famille août
reviews.positives: Location de scooter sur place. Nous nous sommes régalés au restaurant, avec une composition de fruits de mer pour une somme modique de 30 € du poisson, grillé, des crevettes, etc. ￼ en face du ferry, il s’occupe de réserver les billets pour le bateau et de taxi également. ￼ vraiment top et le soir promenade sur le port. ￼
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Trotz Buchung keinen Platz
reviews.negatives:
Leider kann ich keine gute Bewertung schreiben, da wir nicht in der Unterkunft schliefen. Als wir ankamen wurden wir lediglich darüber informiert, dass unsere Buchung nicht mehr vorhabden wäre und das lange im Voraus gebuchte Zimmer nicht mehr verfügbar.
Wir erhielten dann in einer anderen Unterkunft ein Zimmer, was ganz okay war, aber dieses soll ich hier ja nicht bewerten.

reviews.title: Als Notlösung ok
reviews.positives:
Das Personal ist sehr freundlich, leider bekam ich auf Anfrage kein anderes Zimmer.
Der Wasserdruck in der Dusche war gut, aber das Bad nicht sauber.
reviews.negatives: Es war nicht sehr sauber und hat stark nach Schimmel gerochen, man konnte auch einige Schimmelflecken an den Wänden sehen, vor dem Fenster war direkt eine Wand (ca 30 cm entfernt) die Klimaanlage hat nachts sehr laute Geräusche von sich gegeben.

reviews.title: Leider sehr schmutzig, aber traumhafte Lage
reviews.positives: Top gelegen, direkt am Hafen
reviews.negatives: Leider sehr dreckig. Die Bettwäsche war nicht gewechselt und selbst nach der Bitte um einen Wechsel wurde zwar das Laken ausgetauscht, Kopfkissen und Decke hatten aber die selben Flecken und dreckigen Stellen. Massiver Schimmel im Bad

reviews.title: Der Aufenthalt auf den Cham Inseln war wunderschön. Wir haben die Insel sehr GE, das Homestay nicht.
reviews.positives: Das Frühstück war nicht includiert. Man konnte aus der normalen Speisekarte wählen. Qualität war Durchschnitt. Die Lage war sehr zentral, wenige Schritte vom Pier entfernt. Motorbikes konnten im Homestay gebucht werden. Der Hausherr war außerordentlich freundlich und bemüht. Die Chefin des Hauses leider nicht.
reviews.negatives:
Wir haben das Zimmer für 5 Tage gebucht. Es wurde nur auf Aufforderung der WC Kübel geleert und die Handtücher kein einziges Mal gewechselt. Trotz unserer Bemühungen frische Luft in das Zimmer zu bekommen, war immer ein muffiger, stickiger Schimmelgeruch in der Luft.
Die Frau des Hauses war auf Geld aus, ohne Liebe das Haus zu betreuen.

reviews.title: Sehr liebes Personal und gutes Essen! Das Zimmer könnte einen Anstrich gebrauchen
reviews.positives:
Sie liegt direkt am Hafen, so wie fast alle anderen auch. Das Personal war sehr nett und das Essen war gut.
Man kann direkt in der Unterkunft einen Scooter mieten (eventuell sogar günstiger als am Hafen direkt).
reviews.negatives: Der Schimmel im Zimmer wurde offensichtlich schon mehrfach überstrichen. Der letzte Anstrich war jedoch so lange her, dass der Schimmel deutlich zu sehen und zu riechen war.

reviews.title: Schöne Insel!
reviews.positives: Grosses Angebot an Aktivitäten und Essen. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und herzlich. Die Aussicht ist sehr schön.
reviews.negatives: Die Betten waren etwas unbequem. Zudem war das Bad nicht allzu sauber und auch nicht modern.

reviews.title: Wunderschöne Insel - nette Unterkunft
reviews.positives:
Die Besitzerin ist sehr freundlich und hat uns bereits vor der Anreise mit den Tickets für die Fähre geholfen.
Die Unterkunft liegt direkt im Hafen und ist nur wenige Gehminuten entfernt.
In der Unterkunft gibt es günstig Roller zu mieten und Schnorchel. (200.000 bzw. 50.000 VND)

Man ist mittendrin im Dorfleben und muss einfach nur die Ruhe geniessen.
Die Strände sind toll, vor allem wenn die Tagestouristen wieder weg sind :-)
Vor allem der Strand Bai Xep ist total ruhig und abends kommen die Einheimischen selber zum Schwimmen und Sport zu machen.

Natürlich möchte die Besitzerin einen überreden bei ihr zu essen.
Ich habe das auch gerne gemacht, da sie wirklich sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit war.
Wir vermuten, dass wir einfach nicht die richtigen Gerichte bestellt haben, da sie in unseren Augen etwas geschmacklos waren.
Wir haben aber einige gesehen, die frischen Fisch oder das Barbecue bestellt haben und das sah hervorragend aus. (leider esse ich keinen Fisch)
Das Frühstück war aber sehr lecker. (Spiegelei und Pancakes)

reviews.title: Familiäres Hotel
reviews.positives:
Wir wurden sehr freundlich empfangen. 
Das Zimmer mit Meerblick. Super Dusche mit bestem Wasserdruck. Gutes Frühstück und gutes Essen sowie leckere Cocktails. Sehr herzliche Besitzer. Vielen Dank es war ein sehr schöner Aufenthalt.

reviews.title: Esperienza terribile tra topi e blatte, formiche e zanzare
reviews.positives: La posizione è buona, unico lato positivo.
reviews.negatives: Abbiamo preso una stanza da 8 (4matrimoniali e 2bagni) perchè era l'unica disponibile ma la sconsiglierei a chiunqu e soprattutto a qualsiasi famiglia con bambini: piena di zanzare e formiche(anche sui letti), blatte che arrivano dai bagni da cui non ci si può nemmeno isolare chiudendo porte perchè gli spazi sono divisi da tende. Le lenzuola sono completamente sporche, si vede che non le cambiano tra un ospite e l'altro (capelli, sangue, sporcizia), gli asciugamani sono sgualciti. Abbiamo visto i topi al piano terra (proprio dove c'è la reception e dove prepara i pasti) e davanti a noi c'era la proprietaria, ci siamo affrettati a farglielo notare ma ha risposto con nonchalance come se fosse normale!! Ovviamente non abbiamo mangiato nulla e lei ci ha trattati con freddezza come se fosse offesa che non volessimo il cibo dove camminavano i topi. Esperienza terribile!!!!!

reviews.title: Abbiamo un problema...ed è bello grosso!
reviews.positives: Staff accogliente
reviews.negatives: Struttura veramente sporca, molti insetti nella stanza

reviews.title: Posizione buona
reviews.positives: La posizione ottima e lo staff molto gentile e disponibile. Il prezzo molto buono!
reviews.negatives: Purtroppo la camera non era molto pulita, i bagni puzzano di umido e c'erano molte blatte in giro.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Posizione comodissima, vicinissima al porto. Staff gentile e super disponibile.
reviews.negatives: Stanze piccole, molto basic e il “bagno” è poco confortevole.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Posizione, rapporto qualità prezzo
reviews.negatives: Le camere devono essere più pulite

reviews.title: Ideale x alloggiare su Isola di Cham
reviews.positives: Struttura accogliente seppur semplice e molto essenziale,  personale molto disponibile. Possibilità di pranzo, colazione e cena con ricco menù. Comodissima la posizione x la vicinanza al porto. Abbiamo affittato gli scooter. Alloggio assolutamente raccomandato.
reviews.negatives: Spazi piuttosto ristretti in camera, bagno piccolo e migliorabile

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Accoglienza del proprietario, buon ristorante e posizione di fronte al porto
reviews.negatives: Purtroppo un gruppo di inglesi molto maleducati sono stati sulla terrazza condivisa a parlare fino alle tre di notte. Da evitare forse la camera familiare con balcone condiviso se non si è certi di avere in struttura gente educata

reviews.title: Molto gentili
reviews.positives:
Pozione ottima, a 100 metri dal molo dove arrivano le seedboat.
Camera carina e abbastanza pulita.
Ho noleggiato lo scooter e sono stati molto carini da lasciarmelo usare anche dopo il check out fino a che non è arrivata l’ora per prendere la barca.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ottima posizione, proprio sul lungomare, vicinissimo a dove arrivano le barche...c è anche il ristorante....la famiglia che lo gestisce è  gentilissima

reviews.title: Metà da includere nei itinerari di viaggio in Vietnam!
reviews.positives:
L’isola di Cham è carinissima e questa struttura lo è altrettanto.
Non è enorme e si gira in scooter, è una realtà di pescatori, tranquilla e con un mare molto bello.
Sembra che il tempo sia bloccato.
La struttura si trova molto vicina al porto dove attraccano le barche e comunque al centro del villaggetto sorto lì intorno con mercatino e ristorantini annessi.
Dal vivo è molto più carina che dalle foto, perché è semplice ma comoda ed ha tutto ciò che serve. 
Noi avevamo camera vista mare, carina d confortevole.
I proprietari sono molto carini e disponibili ad aiutarti e consigliarti.
Noleggiano loro scooter, bici e quant’altro come vedete nelle foto.
Hanno anche il ristorantino dove fare colazione/pranzo/cena 
Approvato!

reviews.title: Slecht
reviews.positives: We moesten plots met de boot terug, het zou gaan stormen. Dus moesten we extra betalen voor de overtocht van het eiland naar het vaste land .SLECHT
reviews.negatives: De hygiëne,  personeel,

reviews.title: Je krijgt wat je mag verwachten voor wat je betaald
reviews.positives: De eigenaresse is superaardig en en geeft je een welkom gevoel ondanks het feit dat ze slecht Engels spreekt. De airco werkt goed op de kamer en het uitzicht op zee is geweldig. De kamer is niet duur en eigenlijk krijg je wat je mag verwachten voor die prijs. Je kunt goed eten in het restaurant van de accommodatie. De eilanden snorkel tour die zij aanbiedt is goed en leuk om te doen.
reviews.negatives: De kamer en badkamer zijn niet zo mooi als op de afbeelding. De bedden hebben doorgezakte matrassen. Er is een Karaokebar in de buurt die de volumeknop erg hoog heeft staan waardoor je tot een uurtje of 10 geluidsoverlast hebt.

reviews.title: Voor deze prijs een fantastische plek, lekker kneuterig maar wel personeel dat alles voor je wilt doen
reviews.positives: Prima Locatie en vriendelijke personeel. Bedden waren goed. Leuk restaurant met betaalbaar goed eten. De snorkeltour was top.
reviews.negatives: Badkamer was gedateerd en niet heel erg schoon. Rest van de kamer was ook wat stoffig

reviews.title: Alojamento simples mas adequado.
reviews.positives: Bonita vista para o porto em zona muito central. Disponibilidade dos anfitriões em arranjar as melhores condições. O ar condicionado estava com problemas e foi logo arranjado. Todos os passeios turísticos foram arranjados para nós sem termos que ser nós a preocupar-nos com isso.
reviews.negatives: A variedade no pequeno-almoço era pouca.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Chủ nhà thân thiện, gần bến tàu, có cho thuê xe máy, có phục vụ ăn uống
reviews.negatives: Mình ở phòng 2 giường ngủ, trên tầng 3, có cửa sổ lớn nhìn ra biển, tuy nhiên phòng cũ, nhà vệ sinh không được sạch.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: View đẹp. Nhà nấu đồ ăn ngon.
reviews.negatives: Phòng quá chật, buồng tắm cũng quá nhỏ. Nếu ở 1 ngày thì tạm được. Ở lâu hơn sẽ không tiện.

reviews.title: Rất yên tĩnh vì vẫn chưa đến mùa khách đến du lịch đảo.Gđ mình qua đảo 1 tuần mưa 3 ngày và nắng 3 ngày .Rất thịk những
reviews.positives: Có ban công nhìn ra mặt biển, kế bên chợ.(tân hiệp)
reviews.negatives:
Radio của làng mở sáng sớm 😇
Những cửa hàng tạp hóa xung quanh làng bán giá chênh nhau.
Những quán bán hàng ăn ko ngon lắm.
Bánh bèo bột cứng và nước mắm thì mặn khó ăn ,bún bò nước lèo nhạt thiếu gia vị 😟

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: View nhìn ra biển cho cảm giác thoải mái

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Cô chú chủ ks rất nhiệt tình.nấu ăn ngon

reviews.title: Hieno paikka ja upea palvelu
reviews.positives: Hieno näkymä satamaan, siisti huone ja erinomainen palvelu. Ravintolan ruoka oli aivan täydellistä. Paikan omistaja oli todella ihana ja sydämellinen!

reviews.title: Есть нюансы, но остров потрясающий и хозяева отеля приятные, теплые люди.
reviews.positives: Понравились гостеприимные хозяева. Очень улыбчивые, доброжелательные, милые люди. Приняли, угостили чаем, выдали ключи от номера, дали ориентиры и вежливо с энтузиазмом помогали во всём разобраться! Виды из отеля невероятно красивые!
reviews.negatives: Грязные ванные комнаты, стены в ванной были очень грязные и заляпанные, также были грязные в пыли полы. Также в самом отеле еда была ну в очень большом количестве масла, мы с девочками покушать там не смогли. Ещё нам пришлось проснуться в 6 утра из-за жутко громкой музыки на улице, мы не смогли даже понять откуда она там. Поэтому, если вы приезжаете в эти места, лучше не надейтесь на долгий утренний сон. В 6 утра музыка, в 7 утра уже довольно громко ведут себя вьетнамцы. Но если честно, то это все мелочи. Отель хороший, владельцы невероятно приятные люди. Я не смотря ни на что с радостью приеду ещё! ❤️

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Läget är fantastiskt! Ca 3 min gångavstånd från piren man anländer till. Ca 15 min promenad till Sunset Beach - en underbar strand!
reviews.negatives: Boendet är ganska nedgånget, men absolut okej för den lilla slanten man betalar för att bo där.

reviews.title: Tyvärr mycket nedgången semesterort där det mesta var stängt, rivningsfärdigt.
reviews.positives: Nära till båten, fin utsikt. Den strand som fanns inom gångavstånd var fin, allt var dock stängt.
reviews.negatives: Området/ön var mycket slitet, nedgånget. Det mesta var stängt, restauranger mm. Vi åkte tidigare, det fanns inget att göra eller se.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Lokalizacja, właściciele i klimat tego miejsca godny polecenia a wszystko dopełnia wspaniała lokalna kuchnia. Otrzymaliśmy pełne wsparcie i opekę personelu. Polecam
reviews.negatives: Brak

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Сніданок смачний. Дуже добре розташування, ввічливий персонал! Дозволили покласти продукти в спільний холодильник.
reviews.negatives: Не було свого холодильника у номері, але це компенсували тим що дозволили покласти продукти у спільний холодильник.

reviews.title: Bona estada a les Illes Cham
reviews.positives: L’ubicació i el tracte del personal.
reviews.negatives: La netedat, el lavabo no estava nèt.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Està situat a una zona molt cèntrica i estàs a prop de tot. El mateix homestay et facilita l'alquiler de diferents serveis allà mateix: moto, equip d'snorkel, lavanderia...
El personal agradable i amb ganes de fer-se entendre. 
L'habitació neta i agradable.

reviews.title: Do not book there - it could be a lot of drama...
reviews.positives: Nada
reviews.negatives:
We booked a room for one night and also the boat tickets.
Then when we were already on the way to the island, the owner cancelled us the room - at the same day!!!
It was really Bad, as it was on a weekend and we arrived there with no place to stay. 
The owner didnt even helped us out to find another place. I guess he met someone on the island who would pay more for the room without using booking.com, then he cancelled us.

So if You don't want to arrive at the island without having a room - Do definitely not book the Sunbay Homestay!

reviews.title: Most uncomfotable stay,
reviews.positives: Cham Island itself was a great place to experience local village life, not too many developments or hotel options.. I enjoy the short walk to the beach, morning coffee shop and great view from balcony. We appreciate the man who came and greet us and walks us to the hotel.
reviews.negatives: This has to be the worse homestay experiences for are family., the very dirty and awful smelly room. This is the family run businnes yet lacking of homestay charm. When we order foods from the menu with the male owner, was qoutes one price and charge different at pay time. At check out the lady try to swiddle for extra money for room. I have to show her our orginal booking prices.

reviews.title: Noisy
reviews.positives: The view from the shared balcony
reviews.negatives:
The motorbike which we rented was too old , loud and turned off 2-3 times. Luckily we could give it back. Would not make it up the mountain roads...

I'm super tired after this weekend and couldnt enjoy fully the days on cham island because of the nights. Even with good earplugs: 1 night: until 1 pm tables and chairs got moved, loud doors, ac directly in the face while sleeping (got sick) . 2 night: loud karaoke from the owners until 11 pm. You can not decide when you want to sleep. In the morning is noisy because of the market next door.

reviews.title: I wanted a romantic room with a sea view, but in fact it looks like a hostel. Only for 1 night!
reviews.positives: The location is excellent, next to the pier, from the window you can see the sea and boats
reviews.negatives: the rooms and the house itself require renovation, everything is very modest

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The beaches
reviews.negatives: The owner tried to rip me off

reviews.title: It was as expected for the price on a fairly remote island
reviews.positives: Breakfast was not included (which we were aware of) but we ordered breakfast on 2 days and dinner on 1 night.  Food was very good at these meals.  The location straight on the harbour front was excellent.
reviews.negatives:
we found the bed uncomfortable - i had to use my inflatable thermarest mattress on top!  There were cockroaches coming into the bathroom via the shower waste - which i appreciate is not unusual for the tropics but it was the only place we stayed in 3 weeks where we saw them.
The political/information broadcast from the loudspeakers on the harbour front at 5.30 each morning was a real pain and was extremely loud.  It was impossible to sleep through it

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: I could say the whole experience was okay. The bed was comfortable and AC worked. The owners are very friendly and helpful too. The location is perfect to go around. Right next to restaurants and ferry. They have food and drinks right downstairs with reasonable price.
reviews.negatives: But there are some suggestions that I hope the homestay might need to improve: we don’t have any hot water to shower, we ended up shower in cold water. The bathroom needs to pay more attention, like other review said, they seem dont clean the bathroom, only the bedroom. The floor is very sticky and sandy.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Beautiful views across the bay, basic but comfortable bed
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately food isn’t that great

reviews.title: Overall, it’s a great island with a convenient location. The price was reasonable, but the cleanliness could be improved
reviews.positives: The location was excellent—very close to the harbour. There’s a motorbike rental available, the option to book tours, and a bar located downstairs.
reviews.negatives: The place wasn’t very clean or fresh, and some things needed fixing (though a renovation is underway, so this will probably improve soon). Unfortunately, during our stay, there was noise from drilling. The hosts were friendly but repeatedly offered food from the restaurant several times a day, which made us a bit uncomfortable, as we preferred to eat out. Please note that paying by card incurs an additional 5% charge. Surprisingly, I left some clothes for the laundry service, but when I collected them the next day, I discovered they hadn’t been washed—although I was still charged.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Good location. Very friendly owners, super helpful
reviews.negatives: The room smelled so musty, beds were mediocre

reviews.title: Good view, and close to boat pier
reviews.positives: The location, and great view from room
reviews.negatives: Needs modernisation, lot of insects in room and mould on wall and ceiling. Pressure from owners to eat only there

reviews.title: The location is amazing and the staff were very friendly. We would be happy to stay again if we ever found ourselves in
reviews.positives: The location is pristine and it was so nice to be able to enjoy the view with the balcony outside our room
reviews.negatives: The bathroom wasn’t very clean, cracked tiles etc.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I already stayed at Sunbay last year and it was good , so I can not leave a bad review . Though this year they cancelled my booking after accepting it . Fortunately we could find an other homestay which was good also .
reviews.negatives: The way they cancelled my booking after accepting . They cancelled only by messsge but I did not see an official cancellation on Booking app . So I hope I will not be charged for the stay we did not have .

reviews.title: Good location & welcoming hosts
reviews.positives: Good location on Cham Island near the dock. The owners were very helpful and friendly. We had cocktails brought up to our verandah to watch the sunset which was lovely. The view from the room was great. The owners were happy to help us with motorbike hire and boat transfers & also changing our original boat bookings when we decided to leave the island a day early.
reviews.negatives: For us one day here was enough to check out Cham Island. The homestay bed even though it had a doona layer on the mattress was unfortunately still too hard for us. We didn’t ask for more padding as we were leaving the next day. We only ate at the homestay, food was ok.

reviews.title: We had a great stay at Sunbay. Comfortable room in a great location and had a great stay at this sup
reviews.positives: Great location, friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice place to stay just in the heart of the island. Short walk to all the restaurant. You can reach very nice beaches riding a scooter .

reviews.title: Pleasant great location beautiful view
reviews.positives: Location excellent

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The view from the window was great.
reviews.negatives: Owner tried to cheat us on money twice

reviews.title: Beautiful views and good value
reviews.positives: Good value, close to the ferry terminal and lots of restaurants. Beautiful view!
reviews.negatives: I stayed and 2 nights and both nights there was crazy loud singing right outside my room. This is not the hotels fault but if you are after peace and quiet then you won’t get it here. Thankfully they stopped by about 10.30pm so sleeping was no problem. However, it’s also right next to the market so you hear quite a lot of commotion early in the morning as they set up - again, not the hotels fault but worth noting if you’re after a quiet getaway.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: Excellent stay, lovely staff so helpful and friendly.  Lovely clean rooms and great food

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The sea view room had a beautiful view over the harbour and the room was comfortable and spacious. The owners are friendly, and the restaurant has a good selection of food, open for all meals. The location is perfect, on the waterfront road in the middle of the main town on the island, with plenty of restaurants to choose from nearby.
reviews.negatives: Most nights we stayed in the homestay, there was loud karaoke right in front of and beside the property. Although it didn't go too late at night - finishing at 10pm - the evenings were not the peaceful island experience we were hoping for. The balcony is shared, which means that other people can walk in front of the room and look into the room through the large window that fronts onto the balcony. The room could have been cleaner.

reviews.title: Quiet island  and peacefull Homestay
reviews.positives:
Thanks to all the staff that makes our trip greatfull.
Room with a sea view ans the Homestay is close to the beach.
Food was great !!!!

reviews.title: We thoroughly enjoyed our time at Sunbay homestay.
reviews.positives:
Sea view room is fabulous.
Hosts are very helpful, communication in English was good
Host organised our snorkel trip for a very good price.
Food is excellent and their seafood is very affordable.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Such wonderful people, perfect location- right near the dock, and delicious food. The room had everything you need, we were able to rent scooters from the property to ride around the island and they were able to give us directions to the easier routes for us to take. Cannot recommend this stay enough, thank you :)

reviews.title: Great value, great staff
reviews.positives: Great location, great staff, very clean and right next to the speedboat landing point.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: 10/10 host was amazing as was the food and the view
reviews.positives: Loved staying here, excellent food.  Made very welcome by our host, nothing was too much trouble.  A taste of paradise.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Just perfect
reviews.positives: Everything was just perfect
reviews.negatives: There is nothing to complain about this property.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The host Young was simply amazing, I felt at home from arriving. Young couldnt have been any more accomodating and always with a lovely smile on his face. Food was great, prices amazing but the hospitality and location were second to none. Thank.for a beautiful time, we will be back.xx

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great staff, always did everything quickly with any questions. We rented bikes and rode around the island. The hotel has delicious food in the cafe.

reviews.title: Nice stay in Cu Lao island
reviews.positives: Nice place to stay. The owner is very sweet lady also  very helpful. She also has motorbikes in case of rentals. Breakfast was delicious.
reviews.negatives: I already told the owner personally

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We had a lovely stay on Cham Island. The hosts were very kind and attentive, making us feel right at home. The food at their restaurant was fresh and absolutely delicious, we ended up having dinner there every evening. Overall, it was a very pleasant stay.

reviews.title: We intended to stay 3 days, stayed 6, I think that says it all!!!
reviews.positives:
The location of the property was fantastic. Right on the sea front, we had the front room with balcony and it was just wonderful to sit and watch village life. Also a 10 minute walk to a lovely beach. Walking round the island was what we preferred but you could rent a bicycle or motorbike. 
The host and staff were brilliant. So helpful and accommodating. Offered to help book speedboat tickets which I would do next time. Day trips could be organised also. I did the bucket boat trip and had fun learning how to paddle it. The food and drinks were lovely and a very good price.
I loved this island and the homestay and would definitely come back again. So much life on the island, monkeys, a lovely dog next door that came walking with us. Just a beautiful place with beautiful people.
reviews.negatives: There wasn’t anything I didn’t like actually.

reviews.title: Great location and value for money.
reviews.positives: Awesome location. Next to harbor. Very friendly host. Allowed us to check in early- no worries

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The family was adorable and they made feel us like home.

reviews.title: Sunbay home stay was amazing, the location, staff and seafood were excellent!
reviews.positives: Amazing view

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The owners Mr lung and mama were lovely. They have everything you need to have a wonderful stay, have motorbike hire, snorkel gear, can book tickets for your onward travel. And mamas cooking is delicious. Room is clean with nice hot shower.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The hôteliers were incredibly nice. The service was impeccable and the food delicious. Great location on a lovely island.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Lovely hosts with a positive attitude, great service and fun! ( Dancing, a joint training session and even hugs !) We had fun with the language barrier and google translate and when we asked if there was any way the 5 am music blast could be turned down a notch since we were remote working and having an exam during the night, the host managed to have it turned down! 
The food was great, the view from our room was beautiful , the closest beach was a gem and the island is really charming.
We had no problems with the payment, and we felt very welcome and well taken cared of! 
We found the bed to be of perfect hardness because of the topper. We really recommend this place and wish the owners the best.
reviews.negatives: In the hosts best interest we would suggest to air the rooms before guests arrive and to do the cleaning a bit more thoroughly.

reviews.title: Lovely owners, great place to stay. Amazing value.
reviews.positives: Beautiful property, a minutes walk from the pier, in a quiet, lovely town on the east side of the island. The rooms were great with really comfy beds. Highly recommend the sea view.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The staff of the homestay was incredibly friendly and welcoming! They helped us with our snorkeling trip and even attended to special requests (food, massage ect.) 
I would only recommend staying here! Amazing!!

reviews.title: Heaven
reviews.positives: The hosts, location, view and value for money cannot be beaten. Our hosts were the kindest, most caring and helpful people you could meet. They helped us to get the boat back to Hoi an and even waited for us to send us off and make sure we got on the right boat. They were so attentive and lovely I can only recommend to stay here. This stay also doubles as a restaurant and we were able to eat almost all our meals here while we were on the island. You can also do many activities organised through this homestay for amazing prices. We extended our stay because we loved it here so much.
reviews.negatives: The only fault is the bed is a little hard!
